# komodo_variable (Data Source)

Reads an existing Komodo variable.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "komodo_variable" "example" {
  name = "MY_VARIABLE"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) The variable identifier (same as name). One of `name` or `id` must be set.
- `name` (String) The variable name. One of `name` or `id` must be set.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) The variable description.
- `secret_enabled` (Boolean) Whether the variable is secret.
- `value` (String) The variable value.
